hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer · C# & .NET · AI · Unity · Web3
hero.bio: Developer since 2017 building resilient platforms and intelligent experiences. Unity Certified Developer with deep expertise in games, blockchain, and AI-driven products.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.empty: No projects in this category yet.
projects.desc_apex_ai: Sim racing telemetry platform delivering real-time coaching, lap delta insights, and predictive performance cues.
projects.desc_fishdex: AI-powered marine species identification with smart capture workflows and taxonomy enrichment.
projects.desc_vaultpass: NFT Access Infrastructure — white-label platform for creating, distributing and monetizing Access Pass NFTs.
projects.desc_block_jar_tip: Full-stack Web3 tipping dApp where merchants deploy their own smart contract, generate a unique QR/link, and receive on-chain tips with optional messages.
projects.desc_greeting_wall: Full-stack Web3 dApp where users connect their wallet, submit on-chain greetings, and read the latest messages from blockchain event history.
projects.desc_eth_agents: Claude Code plugin bringing a team of 10 specialized AI agents to Ethereum development. Describe what you want in plain English — eth-agents figures out the rest.
projects.desc_utc: Official party game app licensed by the Castro Brothers for Android. Players try not to laugh at absurd dares and challenges. Free-to-play with 1K+ downloads.
projects.desc_crossbar: Global Game Jam 2018 entry. Play as a switchboard operator connecting incoming transmissions under pressure before you get fired. Made with Unity.
projects.desc_play_educa: Educational platform with 100+ licensed Disney character activities for children, featuring IAP, Addressables, and a REST API + CDN content pipeline targeting Android, iOS, and WebGL.
projects.desc_truzzle: Casual puzzle game published on Steam. Take the ball from start to finish through 80+ handmade levels with increasing difficulty — spins, teleports, and moving parts included.
projects.desc_peg_adventure: Steam puzzle game — a fresh take on classic peg solitaire. Unlock levels with peak performance across 3-star challenges and 43 Steam achievements. Published by Dreamlight Games.
projects.desc_grave_knight: Interactive RPG Visual Novel on Steam with 70k+ words, dice-roll combat, 3 playable classes, and nonlinear storytelling inspired by the SRD 5.1 ruleset. Published by Dreamlight Games.
projects.desc_shieldmaiden: Console porting of Dumativa's pixel art action-adventure to Xbox One and Xbox Series X|S. Synthwave atmosphere, 4 areas, boss fights, and cloud saves — published on the Microsoft Store in 2023.
